title: aneilema elatum
intro: Aneilema elatum, also known as the small blue-eyed grass, is a plant species that belongs to the Commelinaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Aneilema elatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
